mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO message ( message_id, conversation_id, sender_id, message_type, content, metadata_json, sent_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{m.messageId}, #{m.conversationId}, #{m.senderId}, #{m.messageType}, #{m.content}, #{m.metadataJson}, #{m.sentAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO UPDATE SET content = EXCLUDED.content, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO conversation_state ( conversation_id, last_message_id, last_message_preview, last_sender_id, last_sent_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{conversationId}, #{lastMessageId}, #{lastMessagePreview}, #{lastSenderId}, #{lastSentAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (conversation_id) DO UPDATE SET last_message_id = EXCLUDED.last_message_id, last_message_preview = EXCLUDED.last_message_preview, last_sender_id = EXCLUDED.last_sender_id, last_sent_at = EXCLUDED.last_sent_at, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
